assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 13: Affected version range is "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no specific version threshold provided). Lines 40-43 explicitly flag imprecise version data: "Affected range: 'versions prior to the fix' -- lacks a specific version threshold."

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 7-14: Source is https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901. Parsed data shows "Affected versions: lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)" and "Fix threshold: 0.4.8".

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 18-25: Source is https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901. Parsed data shows "Affected range: introduced 0, fixed 0.4.8 (SEMVER)" and "Fix threshold: 0.4.8".

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 36-37: "Agreement: MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev both report the fix threshold as 0.4.8." Lines 45-49: "Fix threshold for Step 2.3: h2 >= 0.4.8" and "This enriched threshold supersedes the imprecise Jira description data and will be used for all version impact comparisons in Step 2.3."

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 5-6: "h2 < 0.4.8 is vulnerable (from Step 1.5 cross-validated enrichment). h2 >= 0.4.8 is fixed." All comparisons use 0.4.8 as the threshold (e.g., "h2 0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (fix threshold)", "h2 0.4.5 < 0.4.8 (vulnerable)"). No reference to imprecise Jira data for version comparison.
